_comment: INPUT fixture for the v0.4.0 canonical-shape feature (DAAS-167/168). `question` is intentionally a list and `guidance` uses short-form aliases so the scripts exercise canonicalize_questions() and normalize_guidance(); the canonical OUTPUT is what build_submission_artifact.py / validate_submission.py produce from it, e.g. question "1. How exposed are we...\n2. ..." and guidance "Strategic / Executive;Technical / Tactical". Not an already-canonical payload.
driver: An active geopolitical conflict has our board asking how exposed we are to spillover cyber risk. The CISO needs a defensible position by the next board meeting because the audit committee has started asking about nation-state threat readiness.
question: Cyberattacks — How exposed are we to nation-state spillover given our sector?
Energy & Supply Chain: How do we prioritize hardening across critical third parties?
Board reporting — What is the right way to frame this risk without overstating it?
details: Mid-size manufacturer, security team of 8, AWS-primary. NIST CSF program, NYDFS-adjacent customers.
availability: Tuesdays and Thursdays after 2pm ET, week of June 15 preferred
